channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Linda Ronstadt's 1980 Career Shift: From Rock to Broadway Success
item.description: In 1980, Linda Ronstadt marked a pivotal moment in her career by transitioning from her iconic rock persona to a celebrated Broadway theater star. Frustrated with the constraints of stadium rock, she ...

item.title: Parramatta to benefit from Luai's short-term Eels contract

item.title: Election Commission extends SIR schedule for multiple states and Delhi

item.title: Khampepe commission continues inquiry into apartheid-era crimes

item.title: Alas Pilipinas Men Fall to Cambodia in 5 Sets During SEA V Cup
